authorization.scope: narrow B3 dependency timing, current-source verification, capture reuse, and autosave scheduling correction

discovered_gaps.dependency_timing: The entry schedules application and app dependencies on project-store only at B4, but B3 must compile and test the off-product application service before the product cutover.
discovered_gaps.source_algorithm: The entry does not freeze the current schema-1 source traversal, dtype conversion, validity, cache, or source-drift facts needed to derive D-009 honestly.
discovered_gaps.application_lifecycle: The entry does not freeze source-session currentness, verified-runtime handoff, stale prepared-runtime disposal, or identity invalidation behavior.
discovered_gaps.capture_reuse: The existing capture source contract does not distinguish genuinely new artifact bytes from actor-authenticated unchanged direct or paged objects already bound to the open generation.
discovered_gaps.autosave_clock: The provisional-autosave correction explicitly leaves the 30-second idle and 120-second maximum timer semantics unfrozen.
discovered_gaps.product_reachability: The B1 checker rejects every reverse dependency, so it cannot distinguish compile-only B3 integration from B4 product construction and polling.
discovered_gaps.validator_scope: The immutable WP-08A dependency matrix needs an exact successor-owned allowance without rewriting its accepted JSON.

dependencies.rule: These are the only B3 additions. Project-store's own dependencies and every inherited lower-level API remain unchanged.
dependencies.architecture_validator: crates/xtask/src/arch/wp08a.rs may recognize exactly these additions while keeping architecture/wp08a-subsystem-contract.json immutable.

current_source_verification.sequence: take a complete bounded pre-inventory, run the D-009 base-scale scan, then require an exact complete post-inventory match before issuing a verified catalog
current_source_verification.inventory: reject symlinks and special files, sort every normalized source-relative regular-file tuple (path, byte_length, BLAKE3 digest) bytewise, and derive one deterministic BLAKE3 inventory root; any addition, removal, type change, length change, digest change, or traversal drift returns SourceChanged
current_source_verification.cache: an optional machine-local XDG cache is non-authoritative, nonfatal, and at most 67108864 bytes; a cache hit may avoid redundant metadata work but still hashes the complete source closure and cannot bypass either inventory
current_source_verification.memory: the hashing stream buffer is at most 1048576 bytes; decoder, tile, canonical-value, and validity scratch is admitted and released through the accepted runtime CPU byte ledger
current_source_verification.scan: hash scale s0 only, require contiguous logical layer ordinals, and use TimeCoordinate::Unknown; accepted source-scientific-to-stored dtype pairs are exactly u8-to-u8, u8-to-u16, u16-to-u16, and f32-to-f32 with exact lossless conversion
current_source_verification.validity: decode exact least-significant-bit validity; invalid samples hash as integer zero or positive f32 zero, while valid f32 values must be finite and retain their exact accepted bits
current_source_verification.source_safety: verification never writes to the source tree

application_integration.operation: production application state extends its existing public enums/types, without new root exports, to own source-verification request, bounded progress, terminal completion, cancellation, and invalidation facts
application_integration.currentness: completion is current only for the exact opened source generation; view or interaction generation changes do not cancel otherwise-current verification
application_integration.promotion: require the verified catalog to be structurally identical to the opened catalog except for identity, prepare its runtime, then atomically replace the current source/catalog/runtime generation; dispose a prepared runtime when completion is cancelled, stale, failed, or superseded
application_integration.test_seam: delete ApplicationState::admit_verified_source_for_test and exercise the production verification completion route in tests
application_integration.drift: observed source drift invalidates the verified binding and blocks project attach, open, manual save, Save As, and autosave until reverification succeeds

project_capture.sources: caller-provided ProjectObjectSource values form a duplicate-free subset containing only genuinely new logical objects
project_capture.reuse: an unchanged direct or paged logical object may omit its source only when the actor authenticates its complete storage binding against the operation's held source generation and lane
project_capture.reopen: an unchanged paged artifact larger than 16777216 bytes remains savable after reopen with zero caller sources
project_capture.save_as: the actor copies and rehashes the authenticated source-generation closure into destination-local staging, including the positive cross-device path
project_capture.failure: a genuinely new logical object without exactly one matching source fails closed before ref publication

autosave_scheduler.eligibility: the verified source is bound, the project is dirty and writable, and no commit is active
autosave_scheduler.deadline: min(latest durable edit tick plus 30 seconds, first pending edit tick plus 120 seconds)
autosave_scheduler.capture: take exactly one immutable capture at the due deadline; edits during capture retain their existing first/latest deadlines
autosave_scheduler.success: clear only revisions included in the completed capture and never advance the manual saved revision
autosave_scheduler.failure: failure or cancellation schedules no automatic retry for the captured revision; an explicit user retry remains allowed and a later durable edit re-arms the timer; CommitIndeterminate alone suspends all project writes until close/reopen
autosave_scheduler.clock: use an injected monotonic clock; a decreasing tick is rejected atomically and tests never sleep

b3_reachability.source_verification: the real product may construct and exercise current-source verification during B3
b3_reachability.project_store_service: the application service is compiled and tested but is not constructed, stored, started, or polled by the product composition root during B3
b3_reachability.sole_product_route: current_project_persistence_bridge plus CurrentProjectRuntime remain the sole reachable product open/save route until B4
b3_reachability.negative_proof: architecture checks must reject every other incoming project-store edge and prove the dedicated service is absent from MiranteWorkbenchApp fields, constructors, polling, event-loop, shutdown, and UI call paths

verification.public: use the existing policy and Rust groups; add no hosted lane, cache, or artifact
verification.fixture: at most one small public T2 current-source corpus may be added
verification.product: on a real mapped display at 1280x720 and 1920x1080, exercise verification progress, cancellation, successful completion, continued nonblank rendering, and byte-identical source closure
verification.deferred_to_b4: product save, edit-during-save, autosave, recovery, reopen, and Save As validation
verification.tag: B3 creates no WP-10B exit tag

superseded_fields: wp10b-project-store-entry.json dependency rule and stop condition only for the four consumed B3 edges
wp10b-project-store-durability-qualification-correction.json unreachable invariant only insofar as compile-time edges are now permitted; runtime product reachability remains forbidden
wp10b-project-store-contract.json blanket reverse-dependent ban and exact-source-closure capture behavior
invariants: Project-store remains EXPERIMENTAL and product-unreachable throughout B3; B4 alone flips product project persistence authority.
Project-v15 and CurrentProjectRuntime are not changed or deleted before the atomic B4 cutover.
Verified scientific identity comes only from the complete bounded source scan and exact inventory stability; a manifest claim, cache entry, path, slug, or package fingerprint is insufficient.
Source microscopy bytes are never mutated, and all large work remains bounded, cancellable, runtime-accounted, and stale-suppressing.
No persisted project-store byte, path, public root export, filesystem transition, durability tuple, or B2 evidence requirement changes.
evidence: exact correction binding and unchanged project-store wire/public-root/dependency/durability guards
source inventory, dtype/validity, cancellation, drift, cache, memory-ledger, promotion, and nonmutation tests
capture reuse, reopened paged-object, genuinely-new-source rejection, and cross-device Save As tests
injected-clock autosave deadline, edit-during-capture, completion, failure, indeterminate, and decreasing-tick tests
architecture proof that project-store service is compiled/tested but not product-constructed or polled
clean public groups and real-display B3 source-verification validation at both accepted resolutions
non_goals: B4 product project-store construction, project-v15 deletion, save/recovery product validation, or WP-10B exit
WP-10A storage activation, import, analysis, rendering, UI cutover, segmentation, stable formats, or public-data publication
another CI lane, paid runner, large dataset, TiB allocation, or 4K validation
stop_condition: Any inherited identity, dataset, dataset-runtime, current-format, or project-store public/wire API must change; verification cannot prove complete source stability within the declared bounds; or B3 requires a reachable second product project path.
rollback: revert the B3 correction and implementation together while the project-v15 bridge remains the sole product project route
